trivia_bullets.text: Opus VIII (2019) is the eighth FFTCG booster set by Square Enix. Featured Crystal Chronicles with original art commissioned from Yasuhisa Izumizawa. Card 8-008C Golem is among those Crystal Chronicles entries.
sources: Square Enix FFTCG: Opus VIII release page via WebSearch snippet

trivia_bullets.text: The Golem depicted is from Final Fantasy Crystal Chronicles: Echoes of Time (Square Enix, 2009), a multiplayer action-RPG for DS and Wii. In that game the Golem is an earth-element enemy type — slow, heavily armored, a guardian of specific dungeon areas. The squat silhouette, mask-face, and geometric patterning are consistent with FFCC:EoT's Golem visual design.
sources: WebSearch snippet: FFTCG Opus VIII Complete Collection; tradingcardsets.com

trivia_bullets.text: Reported card ability: when Golem enters the field, choose a Forward and give it +2000 power until end of turn; also may be put in the Break Zone to stop a Forward from attacking. The mechanical role in the TCG mirrors its source game role: a temporary defensive obstacle.

The Golem creature type has appeared in virtually every numbered Final Fantasy entry since the original NES game. As a named common in FFTCG, this card occupies the same mass-produced design slot the creature always holds in the series' enemy rosters: a guardian you encounter, not a companion you develop.
sources: Final Fantasy Wiki: Final Fantasy Trading Card Game via WebSearch snippet
